name: codex-privacy-filter
description: A Codex plugin for privacy filtering and sensitive text redaction.

interface.shortDescription: Detect and redact sensitive text before reuse.
interface.longDescription: Codex Privacy Filter helps sanitize text, logs, and command content by masking secrets, tokens, passwords, and other sensitive strings during Codex workflows.
defaultPrompt: Redact secrets from this log output.
Sanitize this text before sharing it.
Check whether this command contains sensitive data.
